channel.title: Gpt on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Gpt on jamesm.blog

item.title: GPT-5.5 Is Here: Real Step Forward or Quiet Iteration?
item.description: OpenAI shipped GPT-5.5 on April 23, 2026 - the first fully retrained base model since GPT-4.5. A look at the benchmarks, the new features, and whether this release actually matters.

item.title: Chatbots & Large Language Models (LLMs)
item.description: A practical explainer on the difference between chatbots and large language models, how modern model families fit together, and how to choose the right AI tool for a task.
